title: Ship Rotation, Thrust, Inertia, Drag, and Speed Limits · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed playtest review reconstructs ship rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits from revision, seed, input frames, simulation snapshots, draw records, audio cues, accessibility settings, profiles, package artifacts, and release evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for frame-rate-independent inertial ship controller after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Update angle from action intent and derive a normalized facing vector without overwriting velocity direction.
Integrate acceleration into velocity and velocity into position with explicit seconds and bounded time.
Preserve momentum and apply a time-scaled damping model whose behavior is tested across frame rates.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ship Facing
steps.instruction:
Order the Ship Facing Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python player-input-to-release evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ship Facing.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Ship Facing assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ship Facing, keep Ship Facing connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.text: A review Asteroids team handles case 6705 during an offline cross-platform release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to integrate rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits with frame-rate-independent Vector2 motion; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects; then run the packaged build with dummy video and audio drivers, missing optional sound, and a corrupted save. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Update angle from action intent and derive a normalized facing vector without overwriting velocity direction.

lines.text: A review Asteroids team handles case 3799 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to integrate rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits with frame-rate-independent Vector2 motion; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Good game feel is only a personal numeric preference.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces. Artifact under review: frame-rate-independent inertial ship controller.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Ship Feel Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Ship Feel Evidence record says frame-rate-independent inertial ship controller looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Ship Feel Evidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient high-frame-rate happy path, omit revision, seed, input and time trace, units, seams, device changes, entity reconciliation, multichannel cues, accessibility settings, failures, recovery, and desktop transfer, then accept a playable animation as Asteroids proof. This does not satisfy Ship Feel Evidence for frame-rate-independent inertial ship controller.

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Ship Feel Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Ship Feel Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review Asteroids team handles case 2180 during a low-power integrated-GPU frame-budget trial. Build deterministic Python evidence to integrate rotation, thrust, inertia, drag, and speed limits with frame-rate-independent Vector2 motion; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Ship Feel Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieving Ship Feel Evidence through the concrete frame-rate-independent inertial ship controller case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Record what required effort · Review Ship Feel Evidence, keep Ship Feel Evidence connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Tune rotation, acceleration, drag, cap, input latency, and feedback against recorded player tasks and objective traces.
